title: Chapter 21
content:
Chapter 21: Conflicted

’Huh? Is she trying to rub my cheeks, I guess she is really into my touch...’

’Nonono...hell no, with the force this hand is coming with it’s definitely a slap...again?!’

’Hehe...you can’t catch me twice with the same move lady’ Denzel smirked as he felt full of himself

Not even long enough for him to fully praise himself in his mind...

SLAP!

The smirk that was about forming on Denzel’s face slowly turned into a frown and he was about fuming just barely holding himself back

"Yeah...yeah...the village chief’s wife..." Denzel said and walked closer to her bed

"...on paper that is" Denzel finished
